verdict: A highly repetitive chart that matches the rhythm of the music but suffers from severe monotony and lazy patterning.

issues.problem: Extreme repetition of the 'JUMP LR -> tap D' sequence. Repeating the exact same physical movement 44 times in a row is incredibly monotonous and exhausting.
Severe lack of jump variety. Almost all jumps are 'JUMP LR', which makes the layout feel one-dimensional and fails to utilize the full pad.
Awkward foot flow. Repeatedly jumping on L+R and immediately tapping D forces the player into repetitive double-stepping or straining bracket-steps.
